user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — Pass 10 (GitHub CI/workflows). Forensic pass over .github/workflows/* (18 workflows). Verdict PASS, no code change. ci.yml runs on pull_request + workflow_dispatch (F-1 live), change-aware (dorny/paths-filter), draft-skip, concurrency-cancel, build-once-reuse, ci-passed aggregator. ZERO schedule: crons across all workflows (billing-cap safe). Cross-cutting finding F-10.1 (ground-truth correction): the 6 agent-*.yml workflows are dispatch-only manual levers into a LIVE agent-runner endpoint + rebuilt lib/agents/* DraftQueue system — NOT orphaned. Growth agents (gtm/distribution/retention/self-optimizer) are gated default-OFF by areAgentsEnabled (#231) across all agents except zero-LLM health_watchdog, plus a budget guard, so the runtime posture matches 'acquisition quarantined OFF' — but the code was retained behind a switch, NOT deleted. The project_growth_layer_deleted memory note (claimed lib/agents deleted) was corrected. Owner item: branch protection on main still OFF (require ci-passed). Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 10 CI record (docs/backend/GITHUB_CI_AUDIT.md) + control-plane only. Documentation pass; CI verified healthy, no source change. (Memory note corrected out-of-band, outside the repo.)
required_browser_proof: N/A — CI/workflow audit; all 18 workflow trigger blocks read; schedule:/cron: grep returns zero non-comment hits; agent-runner + lib/agents + areAgentsEnabled read to establish quarantine-not-deletion ground truth.
acceptance_condition: CI posture passes: runs on PRs (F-1), change-aware, draft-skip, no schedule crons (billing-safe), single ci-passed aggregator. Agent workflows confirmed dispatch-only + kill-switch-gated (safe). Record in docs/backend/GITHUB_CI_AUDIT.md; growth-layer memory corrected.
anti_regression_checks: no workflow edited — CI behavior unchanged, only audited
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 10 record is up as a PR and merged; continue to Pass 11 (observability).
next_command: Continue Master Audit #445: Pass 11 (observability/logging/Sentry), then 12 (governance meta).
